title: Flying Eagles go down fighting in regionals
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Flying Eagles FC had some bad luck in the Safa Eden Regional Men's League when they lost 0-1 against Fast Eleven (George) at the Thembalethu Stadium in George on Saturday 29 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Flying Eagles FC had some bad luck in the Safa Eden Regional Men's League when they lost 0-1 against Fast Eleven (George) at the Thembalethu Stadium in George on Saturday 29 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Zefanias Mabunda of Fast Eleven scored the only goal of the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fast Eleven's goalkeeper, Mihlali Siko, successfully denied the Flying Eagles any chance of scoring themselves.","html":"Fast Eleven's goalkeeper, Mihlali Siko, successfully denied the Flying Eagles any chance of scoring themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking strong","html":"Looking strong"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game started at a fast pace as the Fast Eleven players built their passes from the centre of the field, going forwards into the box.","html":"The game started at a fast pace as the Fast Eleven players built their passes from the centre of the field, going forwards into the box."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Flying Eagles were determined and looked strong on the left side of the field, employing the pace of Liyabukwa Dyonta to break down Fast Eleven's backline.","html":"The Flying Eagles were determined and looked strong on the left side of the field, employing the pace of Liyabukwa Dyonta to break down Fast Eleven's backline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Flying Eagles FC. Photo: Zama Gagu","html":"The Mossel Bay Flying Eagles FC. Photo: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lixa Bomvana of the Flying Eagles tried his luck in the first half. However, he missed the target."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kamvalethu Dyordane and Mkhanyisi Manciya of Fast Eleven were in the game looking for loopholes, but it was not easy for them to break through the net, ending the first-half with a goalless draw.","html":"Kamvalethu Dyordane and Mkhanyisi Manciya of Fast Eleven were in the game looking for loopholes, but it was not easy for them to break through the net, ending the first-half with a goalless draw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More pressure","html":"More pressure"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half saw the Flying Eagles apply more pressure on Fast Eleven's defenders. Mabunda netted the first goal to make it 1-0 after beating the Flying Eagles' goalkeeper, Luxolo Joka.","html":"The second half saw the Flying Eagles apply more pressure on Fast Eleven's defenders. Mabunda netted the first goal to make it 1-0 after beating the Flying Eagles' goalkeeper, Luxolo Joka."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fast Eleven gained more confidence after hitting the back of the net and were pushing for a second goal in the last few minutes.","html":"Fast Eleven gained more confidence after hitting the back of the net and were pushing for a second goal in the last few minutes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"However, they failed to convert their clear-cut chances. The exciting game ended 1-0 in favour of Fast Eleven."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Flying Eagles' head coach, Hero Nkabinde, told Mossel Bay Advertiser the Safa Eden Regional Men's League is completely different to the Local Football Association (LFA).","html":"The Flying Eagles' head coach, Hero Nkabinde, told Mossel Bay Advertiser the Safa Eden Regional Men's League is completely different to the Local Football Association (LFA)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Let's wait and see when 10 January comes - their team will be better and they will definitely improve on their weaknesses!\" he said.","html":"\"Let's wait and see when 10 January comes - their team will be better and they will definitely improve on their weaknesses!\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
